**Ferrocene Fukui reactivity** — Fukui indices f⁺ (electrophilic), f⁻ (nucleophilic), and f⁰ (radical) computed at the GFN2-xTB level in xtb (GFN2-xTB), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
